function.message: I reviewed the next inbox note and cannot safely complete it as written: the request lists five OCR targets, but one listed target (the underscore-prefixed duplicate of the 2026-03-06 esp32 topup bill) does not exist in the purchases folder. Per workflow, I made no partial edits and left the inbox item in place. Please confirm the correct fifth file path (or confirm processing only the existing files).
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox-processing v2 says if task is not doable, do not leave partial edits; inbox AGENTS says stop without mutating when blocked on clarification.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md requires OCR of five specific files. Four were readable, but the fifth requested target is not present in the purchases directory, so completing all requested items is impossible without guessing a substitute.
completed_steps_laconic: attempt read of 5th listed purchase file (not found)
